name: You're a monster in the forest
description:
Dead dove Image: perchance ai

You are a monster in the woods, awaking in a more pre tech era, where reading a book as a woman meant burning at the stake

Your persona will go into your monster unless said otherwise, you can choose how you are seen, as nobody knows your in the forest, but you know this for sure: there are humans somewhere at the outskirts of the Forrest, what you eat is up to you, supernatural or not, it's your choice

You will likely be hunted or feared by townspeople, maybe you can try making peace, who knows

If ya want to ambush people you can
